process.title: Seamless Experience

process.step1_desc: Fast and secure digital health profiling.

features.subtitle: Comprehensive healthcare management platform designed to meet the demanding requirements of modern healthcare organizations with enterprise-grade security and scalability.
features.card1_desc: Your data is always protected with enterprise-grade security protocols.
features.card2_desc: Monitor and improve healthcare delivery with real-time insights.
features.card3_desc: Enable seamless communication between doctors, patients, and pharmacies.
features.card4_desc: Scalable and reliable cloud hosting for uninterrupted healthcare access.
features.card5_desc: Manage prescriptions, reports, and medical records digitally and securely.
features.card6_desc: Access healthcare from your phone or tablet, anytime, anywhere.
features.card7_desc: Real-time monitoring of appointments, patient status, and emergencies.
features.card8_desc: Leverage artificial intelligence for faster diagnosis and better care.

team.label: The Core of Care
team.title: Experts Behind the Excellence
team.desc: Our team consists of the brightest minds in medicine and technology, working in harmony to deliver pre-eminent healthcare solutions.

about.hero_subtitle: From a graduation project to a revolution in connected healthcare.
about.mission_desc: CareNexus started as a graduation project by six passionate computer science students. Our goal was to solve the fragmentation in healthcare systems through technology. What began in a university lab has evolved into a comprehensive ecosystem connecting doctors, patients, and pharmacies.
about.tech_desc: Built with modern architecture and AI at its core, CareNexus ensures that medical data is not just stored, but utilized to save lives and streamline care delivery.
about.team_desc: Six students, one vision. Meet the team that brought this project to life.

hero.title: How can we help?
hero.subtitle: Find answers, explore our services, or reach out to our team.

categories.title: Browse by category
categories.subtitle: Everything you need to know about using CareNexus effectively.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.desc: Learn how to set up your account and start using our core features.
gettingStarted.contentDesc: Welcome to CareNexus! Our platform is designed to make healthcare accessible, secure, and efficient. Follow these steps to get the most out of your experience.
gettingStarted.proTip: Tip: You can use our Global AI Assistant at any time for help navigating the platform.

step1.title: Create Account
step1.desc: Register as a Patient, Doctor, or Pharmacy to access our ecosystem.

step2.title: Verification
step2.desc: Complete our AI-powered KYC process to ensure a secure platform for everyone.

step3.title: Explore Services
step3.desc: Start using Medical AI, browse the marketplace, or connect with specialists.

step4.title: Personalize
step4.desc: Set up your profile, preferences, and security settings for the best experience.

security.title: Security & Privacy
security.desc: Discover how we protect your health data with elite encryption.
security.contentDesc: At CareNexus, we believe that healthcare is a fundamental right, and so is your data security. We implement multi-layered security protocols to keep your medical information safe.
security.proTip: Tip: Use Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) in your settings to add an extra layer of protection to your account.

feature1.title: Encryption
feature1.desc: End-to-end encryption for all medical records and messages, ensuring only you and your provider have access.

feature2.title: AI-KYC Verification
feature2.desc: Every user is verified using AI-powered face detection and ID OCR to prevent fraud and impersonation.

feature3.title: Data Privacy
feature3.desc: We follow strict data protection regulations, giving you full control over what data is shared.

feature4.title: Secure Infrastructure
feature4.desc: Hosted on AWS and Google Cloud with enterprise-grade firewalls and automated threat detection.

features.title: Platform Features
features.desc: Deep dive into AI diagnostics, e-prescriptions, and more.
features.contentTitle: Everything You Need in One Platform
features.contentDesc: CareNexus is more than just a medical app. We have built an ecosystem that connects all parts of the healthcare experience into one easy-to-use platform.
features.proTip: Tip: You can use the Knowledge AI to search for information about medications or medical conditions anytime.

feature1.title: AI Medical Analysis
feature1.desc: Get instant insights from your symptoms or medical images using our state-of-the-art AI analysis tool.

feature2.title: Secure Marketplace
feature2.desc: Order medications and healthcare products directly from verified pharmacies through our secure checkout.

feature3.title: Health Feed
feature3.desc: A social hub where doctors share insights and patients can learn more about wellness and disease prevention.

feature4.title: Direct Chat
feature4.desc: Communicate securely with specialists or pharmacies to discuss your needs or get professional advice.

helpCenter.title: A complete help center at your fingertips
helpCenter.desc: We've built CareNexus to be intuitive, but we're always here to support you. Our resources are designed to help you navigate the future of healthcare with confidence.

footer.title: Still have questions?
footer.desc: Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out to us directly.

doc_upload.title: Document Verification
doc_upload.subtitle: Upload your documents to complete your profile and access your dashboard.
doc_upload.step_selfie_desc: Take a clear selfie photo with your eyes open and face forward.
doc_upload.step_id_desc: Take a photo of your national ID card or passport — all text must be readable.
doc_upload.step_medical_desc: Take a photo of your medical license or pharmacy registration certificate.
doc_upload.selfie_tip: Good lighting, eyes open, face directly at the camera — no glasses or hats.
doc_upload.id_tip: Place your ID flat on a surface. Ensure all 4 corners are visible and text is sharp.
doc_upload.medical_tip: Ensure the license number and expiry date are clearly readable.
doc_upload.choose_method: Choose how to add your document
doc_upload.camera_error: Camera access denied. Please allow access or upload a file instead.
doc_upload.file_too_large: File too large. Maximum file size is 10MB.
doc_upload.auth_error: Session error. Please log in again.
doc_upload.upload_url_fail: Could not get upload URL. Please try again.
doc_upload.no_capture: Please take or upload a photo first.
doc_upload.upload_failed: Upload failed. Please check your connection and try again.
doc_upload.processing_desc: Our AI is reviewing your photos. This usually takes 30–60 seconds.
doc_upload.verified_desc: Your documents were verified successfully. Welcome aboard!
doc_upload.failed_desc: We could not verify your documents. Please retake clearer photos and try again.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of healthcare professionals who trust CareNexus to deliver exceptional patient care

sarah.name: Dr. Ahmed Samy
sarah.content: The platform helped me monitor patients more accurately, especially those who need continuous follow-up.

michael.name: Dr. Layla Elzahrany
michael.content: As a pediatrician, what matters most to me is daily patient follow-up, and the platform provides a clear and easy way to track all details.

emma.name: Mohamed Khalid
emma.content: Linking lab results directly to patient monitoring is an excellent idea and made decision-making more accurate.

john.name: Dr. Yosef Ali
john.content: Daily follow-up helped me adjust nutrition plans based on accurate data.

sophia.name: Dr. Mahmoud Fouad
sophia.content: Displaying medication history this way reduced the risk of drug interactions and improved service quality.

david.name: Ahmed Saeed
david.content: Continuous alerts made patient follow-up easier and faster.

olivia.name: Mona Ali
olivia.content: The platform helped me track my hemoglobin levels regularly, and sticking to treatment became easier thanks to the reminders.

james.name: Karem Hassan
james.content: I felt there was real follow-up on my condition, and the alerts helped me stay committed to daily blood pressure checks and medication.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions about CareNexus? We're here to help you transform your healthcare experience
contact.infoDesc: Ready to revolutionize your healthcare workflow? Reach out to our team for personalized assistance.
contact.responseTimeDesc: Our support team typically responds to queries within 2-4 hours during business hours.
contact.subscribeDesc: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest healthcare technology insights and CareNexus updates.
contact.sendMessageDesc: Have a specific question or need personalized assistance? Drop us a message and we'll get back to you promptly.
contact.placeholderMessage: Tell us about your needs, questions, or how we can help...

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about CareNexus and how it helps patients, doctors and pharmacists.

items.q: What is CareNexus and who can benefit from it?
items.a: CareNexus is a role-based healthcare assistant platform tailored for patients, doctors, and pharmacists. It streamlines prescription management, reminders, appointment coordination, and secure communication.

items.q: How do I manage my prescriptions using CareNexus?
items.a: Within your dashboard, you can add, view, and update prescriptions. CareNexus also sends real-time reminders to help patients stay on track with their medication.

items.q: How secure is my data with CareNexus?
items.a: CareNexus is HIPAA-compliant and uses industry-standard encryption and authentication to safeguard all your personal and medical information.

items.q: Can I access CareNexus on any device?
items.a: Absolutely—CareNexus is fully responsive, supporting usage on desktops, tablets, and mobile devices through modern browsers.

items.q: How do I create a new account?
items.a: Click on the 'Join CareNexus' button on the login page, choose your role (Doctor, Patient, or Pharmacist), and fill in the required details.

items.q: Is there a mobile app available?
items.a: We are currently a web-based platform optimized for mobile browsers. Dedicated iOS and Android apps are in our roadmap.
You can reach us through the 'Contact' page form, or email us directly at support@carenexus.com.
Yes, doctors have a specialized dashboard to monitor patient adherence to medications and scheduled appointments.
Pharmacists are notified instantly when a doctor issues a digital prescription, allowing for faster processing.
We offer various plans for individuals and enterprise-level healthcare facilities. Check our services page for details.

items.q: Can I integrate CareNexus with existing HIS?
items.a: Yes, we provide robust API integrations for Hospital Information Systems (HIS).
Our AI provides diagnostic insights based on patient data history to assist healthcare professionals in decision-making.

items.q: What happens if I forget my password?
items.a: You can use the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page to receive a recovery email.

items.q: Can multiple doctors manage one patient?
items.a: Yes, through our team collaboration tools, a care team can be assigned to a specific patient.
Reminders are sent via in-app notifications and optionally through email or SMS.
Yes, our cloud infrastructure ensures global availability with low latency.

items.q: Can I export my medical history?
items.a: Patients can download their health records in standardized digital formats at any time.

items.q: How do I schedule a demo?
items.a: You can request a live demonstration through our contact form or the 'Watch Demo' button on the home page.

knowledge.input_placeholder: Ask about drugs, diseases, or medical advice...
knowledge.found_results: I found some information related to your search:
knowledge.no_results: Sorry, I couldn't find clear information on this topic in my database currently.
knowledge.error: An error occurred while searching. Please try again.
knowledge.welcome_message: Hello! I am your smart medical assistant. I can help you search for information about medications, diseases, and comprehensive medical details. What would you like to know today?

hero.title: Everything Your Healthcare Journey Needs
hero.subtitle: CareNexus is a full-stack medical platform connecting patients, doctors, nurses, pharmacists and shipping companies — powered by AI, real-time infrastructure, and bank-grade security.

medical.title: Smart Medical Service Requests
medical.desc: Patients can request on-demand or scheduled care from nearby doctors, nurses, or pharmacists using real-time geo-matching. Supports emergency quick-orders and provider bidding.

ecommerce.title: Pharmacy E-Commerce
ecommerce.desc: A fully integrated pharmacy store with cart management, inventory control, Stripe card payments, cash-on-delivery, and automatic shipping company assignment via contracts.

knowledge.title: Medical Knowledge Hub
knowledge.desc: A searchable knowledge base combining a local curated database, Wikipedia medical summaries, and OpenFDA drug information — all in one smart search endpoint.

notification.title: Real-time Notifications
notification.desc: Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) integration providing push notifications to Android and iOS devices — for order updates, emergency alerts, and provider confirmations.

kyc.title: AI-Powered Identity Verification
kyc.desc: Medical providers must pass a multi-layer KYC before joining the platform — face liveness detection, OCR document reading, manipulation checks, and medical license validation.

social.title: Medical Community Blog
social.desc: A medical blogging platform where providers share knowledge. Posts support images via Cloudinary, nested comments with threading, likes, category filtering, and admin moderation.

how.title: How CareNexus Works
how.sub: A seamless flow from patient request to service completion

s1.title: Verify & Register
s1.desc: Users register with KYC — face scan, document OCR, and identity check for medical providers.

s2.title: Find Nearby Care
s2.desc: Patients post service requests. The system geo-matches nearby qualified providers in real time.

s3.title: Confirm & Serve
s3.desc: Provider accepts, patient selects, and the service begins with real-time tracking and chat.

s4.title: Complete & Review
s4.desc: Both sides confirm completion. Commission is calculated, and the provider can be reviewed.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
security.desc: Every user is verified with AI-powered KYC — face detection, liveness checks, OCR document reading, and international ID format validation via AWS Rekognition and Google Vision API.
